constructs.name: list_dot_product
constructs.notes: ClickHouse has a native dotProduct() over Array(Float32).

constructs.name: list_transform_over_range
constructs.notes: ClickHouse range(a,b) is exclusive on b; DuckDB generate_series(a,b) is inclusive. Add +1 in the rewrite.

constructs.name: array_agg_ordered
constructs.clickhouse_form: (SELECT groupArray(val) FROM (... ORDER BY k))  -- push ORDER BY into subquery
constructs.probe_sql: SELECT groupArray(val) FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([3, 1, 2]) AS val ORDER BY val)
constructs.notes: ClickHouse has no ORDER BY inside aggregate; must sort in a subquery first. In TranSQL+ this shows up in ROW2COL re-chunking (sql_templates.py L102, L373).

constructs.name: fixed_length_array_type
constructs.clickhouse_form: Array(Float32)  -- variable only; no fixed length
constructs.error: Received ClickHouse exception, code: 42, server response: Code: 42. DB::Exception: Array data type family must have exactly one argument - type of elements. (NUMBER_OF_ARGUMENTS_DOESNT_MATCH) (for url http://localhost:8123)
constructs.notes: ClickHouse Arrays are variable-length. Fixed size is not enforced at the type level; enforce in loader instead. Operationally equivalent since all rows written at a given chunk_size are the same length.

constructs.name: pivot
constructs.duckdb_form: PIVOT tbl ON chunk_index USING first(v) GROUP BY row_index
constructs.clickhouse_form:
SELECT row_index,
  (groupArrayIf(v, chunk_index=0))[1] AS c0,
  (groupArrayIf(v, chunk_index=1))[1] AS c1,
  ...
FROM tbl GROUP BY row_index
constructs.error: Received ClickHouse exception, code: 62, server response: Code: 62. DB::Exception: Syntax error: failed at position 1 (PIVOT) (line 1, col 1): PIVOT _probe_pivot_src ON chunk_index USING first(v)
constructs.notes: Core paper post-opt §4.3. Must emit explicit groupArrayIf column per chunk_index in postopt_ch.py. Cost scales with num_chunks; same as DuckDB's PIVOT at runtime.

constructs.name: positional_join
constructs.clickhouse_form: Fold neighbour tables into the same SELECT as multiple computed columns (preferred), or align by rowNumberInAllBlocks() as a secondary workaround.
constructs.error: Received ClickHouse exception, code: 62, server response: Code: 62. DB::Exception: Syntax error: failed at position 63 (Native) (line 2, col 9): Native. Expected end of query. (SYNTAX_ERROR) (for url http://localhost:8123)
constructs.notes: In postopt.py POSITIONAL JOIN is used to SUM partial dot-products. We rewrite as a single SELECT with multiple SUM(...)_i expressions and sum them inline; the join disappears.

constructs.name: create_temp_table
constructs.duckdb_form: CREATE TEMP TABLE t AS SELECT ...
constructs.clickhouse_form: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t ENGINE=Memory AS SELECT ...
constructs.probe_sql: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE _probe_tmp ENGINE=Memory AS SELECT 1 AS x
constructs.notes: ClickHouse requires explicit ENGINE=Memory for TEMPORARY.

constructs.name: create_or_replace_temp_table
constructs.duckdb_form: CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP TABLE t AS SELECT ...
constructs.clickhouse_form: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS t; CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t ENGINE=Memory AS SELECT ...
constructs.probe_sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY TABLE _probe_cor ENGINE=Memory AS SELECT 1
constructs.notes: Two-statement replacement must be issued as separate queries.

constructs.name: duckdb_tables
constructs.duckdb_form: SELECT table_name FROM duckdb_tables() WHERE temporary = true
constructs.clickhouse_form: SELECT name FROM system.tables WHERE is_temporary = 1
constructs.probe_sql: SELECT name FROM system.tables WHERE is_temporary = 1
